Validated against the live Midway widget. The popup search uses input#search-field inside .midway-search-input-container and calls GET https://shop.fassride.com/Products/Search?search={sku}. Use the JSON products[] hit, score by partNumber, then build https://www.fassride.com/details?id={id}. The raw search endpoint alone is not sufficient for prefixed alias SKUs because it can return fuzzy matches.
